events.title: Jennifer Lopez turns 57
events.blurb: American singer, dancer, and actress Jennifer Lopez was born on July 24, 1969.

angles.name: J.Lo's Birthday Bash
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! Global superstar Jennifer Lopez turns 57 tomorrow. We're playing her biggest hits to mark the occasion.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: English singer and songwriter Mick Jagger was born on July 26, 1943.

angles.name: Jagger's Enduring Legacy
angles.copy: The legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday this Sunday. Still rocking after all these years!

events.title: MTV launched (1981)
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first broadcast music video.

angles.name: MTV's Big Bang
angles.copy: It's 45 years since MTV burst onto our screens, forever changing music. Remember the very first video? We're taking you back to where it all began.

events.title: Oasis released Definitely Maybe (1994)
events.blurb: Oasis released their debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, featuring singles like 'Supersonic' and 'Live Forever'.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the game. What's your favourite track from the iconic Britpop debut?

events.title: Woodstock Festival took place (1969)
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair took place from August 15–18, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Remembering Woodstock
angles.copy: It's 57 years since half a million people gathered for three days of peace, love, and music at Woodstock. An unforgettable moment in history.

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death (1977)
events.blurb: Elvis Presley, the 'King of Rock and Roll', passed away on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: Tribute to The King
angles.copy: Remembering Elvis Presley, who left us 49 years ago today. His music and legacy continue to inspire generations.

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's death (1996)
events.blurb: Influential rapper Tupac Shakur was shot on September 7, 1996, and died from his injuries on September 13, 1996, in Las Vegas.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering Tupac Shakur, a voice that defined a generation, who tragically passed away 30 years ago this month. His impact on music remains undeniable.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death (1970)
events.blurb: Guitar legend Jimi Hendrix died on September 18, 1970, at the age of 27.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Remembered
angles.copy: 49 years since we lost the incomparable Jimi Hendrix. His groundbreaking guitar work continues to echo through music history.

events.title: The Beatles released Abbey Road (1969)
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road', on September 26, 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road at 57
angles.copy: It's 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover, those tracks... pure genius.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: American-British singer-songwriter Chrissie Hynde, best known as the frontwoman of The Pretenders, was born on September 7, 1951.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde's Big Day
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 75th birthday to the iconic Chrissie Hynde! A true rock legend with a voice that still captivates.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: English singer and songwriter Liam Gallagher, former frontman of Oasis, was born on September 21, 1972.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Liam!
angles.copy: Our Kid turns 54 today! The one and only Liam Gallagher. Expect some classic Oasis tunes to celebrate.

events.title: John Lennon released Imagine (1971)
events.blurb: John Lennon released his iconic song 'Imagine' on October 11, 1971, in the US and October 24, 1971, in the UK.

angles.name: Imagine at 55
angles.copy: 55 years since John Lennon asked us to 'Imagine'. A timeless message of peace that resonates just as strongly today.

events.title: Apple released the first iPod (2001)
events.blurb: Apple introduced the first-generation iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: The iPod Revolution
angles.copy: Remember your first iPod? 25 years ago, Apple dropped the device that changed how we listen to music forever.

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: James Bond Day is celebrated annually on October 5th, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Happy 007 Day
angles.copy: It's James Bond Day! From iconic theme tunes to unforgettable gadgets, what's your favourite 007 moment?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: English musician, singer, and songwriter John Lennon was born on October 9, 1940.

angles.name: Remembering John Lennon
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we're celebrating the enduring genius of John Lennon. His music and message live on.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: English actor, comedian, screenwriter, and producer John Cleese was born on October 27, 1939.

angles.name: Comedy Legend's Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the incomparable John Cleese! A true titan of British comedy.

events.title: The Beatles released The White Album (1968)
events.blurb: The Beatles released their ninth studio album, 'The Beatles' (commonly known as 'The White Album'), on November 22, 1968.

angles.name: White Album Anniversary
angles.copy: It's 58 years since The Beatles delivered the sprawling masterpiece that is 'The White Album'. What's your hidden gem on that record?
